acceptance_targets: [chapter_17_award_01] Pass if, after the confession at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:183, only one later exchange in the spans beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:189 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:195 primarily restates that Owen could stop the battle but will not, and the other post-confession beat introduces a distinct new pressure or consequence before the turn at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:209. Fail if both spans still mainly rephrase the same verdict.

[chapter_17_dialogue_01] Pass if the revised exit beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:273 each show at least one pressure mark such as a restart, interruption, abandoned clause, or ordinary filler, and no more than one standalone maxim survives between them. Fail if both lines still read as clean aphoristic mic-drops.

[chapter_17_prose_01] Pass if, across the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:89, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:149, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:229, no more than two sentences begin with 'He kept' and at least two of the current recurrence points instead render stasis through a different sentence shape or physical image. Fail if the chapter still leans on the same opening formula three or more times.

[chapter_17_prose_02] Pass if the revised paragraph at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:279 limits upstairs detail to things Owen can hear, smell, feel through the stone, or explicitly imagine from below. Fail if the paragraph still states unseen actions such as who is covering faces, straightening benches, or vomiting behind tapestries as direct fact.

[full_award_004] Pass if, after the revised beat at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5037, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5075, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5127, a reader can point to at least one new tactical or human fact that changes the pressure of the choice rather than merely hearing the choice restated. Fail if the scene still peaks by paraphrasing the book's already-established argument.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after the confession at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:183, only one later exchange in the spans beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:189 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:195 primarily restates that Owen could stop the battle but will not, and the other post-confession beat introduces a distinct new pressure or consequence before the turn at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:209. Fail if both spans still mainly rephrase the same verdict.
findings.problem: Once Owen states the choice plainly, the chapter spends two more exchange clusters restating the same moral fact in nearly the same terms. That over-secures the refusal instead of letting the confession keep widening the damage, so the back half reads more like confirmation of thesis than shortlist-level escalation.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:189, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:195, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:199, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:203, compress one of the post-confession restatement clusters and replace it with a new cost-bearing beat inside the chamber: a changed action from Prue, a fresh technical consequence in Owen's work, or an irreversible relational move that is not just another verbal naming of the same choice.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised exit beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:273 each show at least one pressure mark such as a restart, interruption, abandoned clause, or ordinary filler, and no more than one standalone maxim survives between them. Fail if both lines still read as clean aphoristic mic-drops.
findings.problem: Prue's final verdict lines arrive as polished, quote-ready closure instead of the quieter, more repair-heavy pressure speech the style bible gives her. The judgment is right, but the finish is a little too composed to sound fully overheard.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:273, keep Prue's condemnation but roughen the delivery: let her interrupt herself, reach for plainer diction, or leave one clause unfinished so the exit sounds wounded and controlled rather than authorially sharpened.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, across the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:89, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:149, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:229, no more than two sentences begin with 'He kept' and at least two of the current recurrence points instead render stasis through a different sentence shape or physical image. Fail if the chapter still leans on the same opening formula three or more times.
findings.problem: The chapter keeps returning to the same 'He kept ...' sentence shape to signal endurance. By the fourth recurrence it reads as a visible prose default rather than a freshly observed persistence beat, flattening a scene that otherwise varies pressure well.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the recurrence points at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:89, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:149, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:229 so Owen's continuation is rendered through different syntax and different concrete evidence each time rather than repeated 'He kept' openings.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised paragraph at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:279 limits upstairs detail to things Owen can hear, smell, feel through the stone, or explicitly imagine from below. Fail if the paragraph still states unseen actions such as who is covering faces, straightening benches, or vomiting behind tapestries as direct fact.
findings.problem: The final upstairs montage briefly slips outside Owen's close-third sensorium by asserting specific aftermath actions he cannot directly perceive from the chamber. That weakens the claustrophobic POV control the style bible calls for right before the chapter closes.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:279, keep the sense of upstairs aftermath but tie every detail to what reaches Owen through sound, smoke, vibration, or explicit inference. If you want the wider image, mark it as what he pictures or assumes rather than unframed narration.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after the revised beat at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5037, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5075, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5127, a reader can point to at least one new tactical or human fact that changes the pressure of the choice rather than merely hearing the choice restated. Fail if the scene still peaks by paraphrasing the book's already-established argument.
findings.problem: Once Prue identifies what the clause can do, the chapter spends too much of its remaining climax reiterating whether Owen can stop the battle instead of generating new dramatic pressure while the option is still live. The moral fact is clear, but the scene circles it in argument rather than making the remaining seconds newly costly.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress one repetition loop in the exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5037, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5075, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5127, then spend the recovered space on fresh chapter-local pressure. Good options here are: Prue relays one named casualty or near miss from upstairs; Owen tests the house clause just enough to reveal a sharper tradeoff; or the clause's availability visibly starts narrowing while the battle turns. The revision should not make him kinder. It should make the live cost of his refusal harder to evade.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
